name: Royale Home Holdings Limited
summary: Royale Home Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells home furniture through a network of franchisees primarily in the People's Republic of China. It also sells furniture; manufactures and sells foam; and rents properties. The company is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui East, Hong Kong. Royale Home Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Science City (Hong Kong) Investment Co., Ltd.
